L. 97–248, § 505(a)96 Stat. 676Pub. L. 97–424, § 426(b)(1)96 Stat. 2167Pub. L. 100–223, § 105(e)101 Stat. 1493Pub. L. 101–508, § 9104(1)104 Stat. 1388–355Pub. L. 102–581, § 102(a)106 Stat. 4876In this section, references to the aggregate amounts for fiscal years ending before –1992, are omitted as obsolete. The words “of which $475,000,000 shall be credited to the supplementary discretionary fund established by section 2206(a)(3)(B)” are omitted as executed. In restating section 505(a) (2d sentence) of the Airport and Airway Improvement Act of 1982 (, ), the cross-reference to the discretionary fund was retained but is incorrect because of the restatement of section 507 of the Airport and Airway Improvement Act of 1982 (, ) by section 426(a) of the Highway Improvement Act of 1982 (, ). See section 47115 of the revised title.October 1, 1987Public Law 97–24896 Stat. 676Public Law 97–24896 Stat. 679Public Law 97–42496 Stat. 2167

Notice of Grants, , , provided that:Pub. L. 106–181, title I, § 159114 Stat. 90Apr. 5, 2000“(a).—Timely AnnouncementThe Secretary [of Transportation] shall announce a grant to be made with funds made available under , United States Code, in a timely fashion after receiving necessary documentation concerning the grant from the Administrator [of the Federal Aviation Administration].section 48103 of title 49“(b).—Notice to CommitteesIf the Secretary provides any committee of Congress advance notice of a grant to be made with funds made available under , United States Code, the Secretary shall provide, on the same date, such notice to the Committee on Transportation and Infrastructure of the House of Representatives and the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation of the Senate.”section 48103 of title 49

children.heading: .—Availability of Amounts
children.label: b .—Availability of Amounts
children.text: Amounts made available under subsection (a) shall remain available until expended.
